description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this bright, trendy top. Pair it with a pair of well worn and skinny Fit jeans and sandals for a traditional look with modern styling. Product Details Peach tunic, has three quarter sleeves with elasticated cuffs, round neckline, embroidery at the yoke and above the hemline and flaring pin tucks from below the bust Material and Care Cotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
